tool_input.command:
git add hooks/pre-commit
echo "=== staged ===" && git diff --cached --stat
echo "=== commit ==="
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
hooks/pre-commit: add Caliber refresh step

When Caliber is on PATH, the pre-commit hook now also runs
`caliber refresh --quiet` and `caliber learn finalize`, then stages any
agent-config files Caliber rewrote (CLAUDE.md, .claude/, .cursor/, etc.).
Gracefully no-ops when Caliber isn't installed.

Single source of truth: hooks/pre-commit. core.hooksPath is set to
this directory by scripts/install-hooks.sh, so a fresh `npm install`
wires everything up via the prepare script.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01C3usmPp2L79e6apjCPuGjb
EOF
)"
